_publications._publicationTitle: Genome-wide association study of café-au-lait macule number in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Figure 1 presents the ‐log 10 ( p ‐value) of tests of association using EMMAX on 608,561 SNPs from 112 samples in the CALM1 cohort
details: Successfully genotyped 608,561 SNPs from 112 samples in the CALM1 cohort
